predictedBugs: Missing CNPJ filter in transform() might reject records where orgão has CNPJ but field name differs between endpoints
Mock in test_crawl_incremental_returns_list patches _make_request globally, which could interfere if any test calls crawl() after modifying the mock
Content hash collisions if two different records produce identical key_field strings (same CNPJ, same objeto, same data, same valor)
edgeCases: Empty mock 14133 records without uf field - transform falls back to 'SC' silently
Records with valor_estimado as string with thousands separators (e.g., '150.000,00') - _normalize_legacy handles it but _normalize_lei_14133 does not
Records with pncp_id collision between legacy and 14133 endpoints (impossible due to prefix 'cg_leg_' vs 'cg_14133_')
